content: Verified upstream product changes include session usage/cost, doctor CLI and /doctor, queued-prompt batching, canonical editing across TUI surfaces, /summarize, minimal /btw and /copy, persistent background status, scheduler durability/upsert/versioning, working-directory and cross-host relocation/import, automatic worktree GC, rotating custom-model auth providers, standalone max effort, workflow runtime and dashboards, terminal/clipboard/voice fixes, session durability and subagent persistence, auth/MCP resilience, and extensive guide updates. bum already supersedes some provider/auth/privacy behavior; stock feedback, update, telemetry, App Builder, xAI headers, and stock-home defaults require adaptation or exclusion.
